response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed video and identified sections: informational slideshows (00:00-01:02, 02:00-03:02), song performances (01:02-01:38, 03:02-03:33), and closing speech (03:33-05:01). 
2. Identified the song as 'Hyper Jumpin'' by Hololive 5th Generation. 
3. Searched for 'Hyper Jumpin' hololive 5th generation lyrics' and found original lyrics (Japanese) and translations. 
4. Compiled the full lyrics, ensured correct timestamp formatting, and escaped characters for JSON. 
5. Structured the final JSON.
response.global_summary: The video is an informational promotional piece for the 'Nepolabo Live re:VISION' concert, featuring an informational slideshow about ticket sales and merchandise, interspersed with two performances of the song 'Hyper Jumpin'' by the Hololive 5th Generation VTubers, followed by a closing speech.

scenes.description: Informational slideshow presenting the concert, ticket information, and promotional details about the event 'Nepolabo Live re:VISION'. No vocal music.
First performance of 'Hyper Jumpin'' by Hololive 5th Generation (Momosuzu Nene, Omaru Polka, Yukihana Lamy, Shishiro Botan). Vocal music playing.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hyper jumpin' now
Hyper jumpin' now
Hyper jumpin', let's jump out
Come on baby, shine bright
My heart is pounding, pump it up
Hyper jumpin', to beyond the dreams
More, more, I want more excitement
Hyper jumpin' now
Hyper jumpin'
It's better to play like a child, right?
My tension is climbing up from the low pressure
While getting drunk, I keep replying to @ (mentions)
Driving the cart, the mission proceeds
Speeding up just like this
I wonder what's waiting at the destination
I'll get a running start on these unstoppable feelings
Let's go, beyond the dimensions (Come on!)
Hyper jumpin', let's jump up and down
Getting high, until I turn to ash
Dancing shake it up
Hyper jumpin', to the other side of the sky
More, more, I want to get closer
(Woah-oh, woah, woah-oh-oh-oh)
I want my heart to race, gimme, gimme, gimme love
(Woah-oh, woah, woah-oh-oh-oh)
More, more, I want to fly higher
Hyper jumpin' now
Hyper jumpin'
Attacking from an angle to solve the question
The chainsaw that cuts through the negativity
A session of interacting with the flowing comments
Training my aim and firing a flick shot
Dis is no, no
If you like it, more, more, more
The noise that gets in the way
Shoot it down, bang, bang, bang
I just want to play
Ignore the antis
Laugh it off, kick it all away
Kick it! Jump around! Jump around!
We'll keep traveling on this journey
I wonder what's waiting at the destination
Linking with the future I believed in
Let's go, beyond the dimensions (Come on!)
Hyper jumpin', let's jump over it
Getting high, until I turn to ash
Dancing shake it up
Hyper jumpin', to the other side of the sea
More, more, I want to get closer
(Woah-oh, woah, woah-oh-oh-oh)
I want my heart to race, gimme, gimme, gimme love
(Woah-oh, woah, woah-oh-oh-oh)
More, more, I want to fly higher
Hyper jumpin' now
Hyper jumpin' now

scenes.description: Logo/text screen displaying 'ねぽらぼライブ re:VISION Holoearth Live'. No vocal music.
Credits/date announcement screen for the concert. No vocal music.
Informational slideshow repeating information about ticket sales and merchandise. No vocal music.
Second performance of 'Hyper Jumpin'' by Hololive 5th Generation. Vocal music playing.
